name: Scott's Salad with Nectarines & Peanuts
recipeIngredient: 1/2 medium red onion, sliced thin into rings
1 cup jicama, sliced thin into 1/2-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the mesclun lettuce, dry roasted peanuts, red onion, celery, jicama, and nectarine wedges.
2. Toss gently with Peach-Dijon dressing until evenly coated.
